title: ASR Outdoor 4 Piece Gold Panning Classifier Accessories Kit with Trowel and Vial

ASR Outdoor 4 Piece Gold Panning Classifier Accessories Kit with Trowel and Vial

Be prepared with the right tools when you’re in the field gold mining or gold prospecting with the handy ASR Outdoor 4-Piece Gold Panning Accessory Tools Kit. Featuring two plastic trowels or scoops, one ½ inch classifier screen and one glass vial, these accessories will help in your gold recovery and storage efforts and are suitable for beginners and seasoned prospectors alike!

Your kit includes:

Key Features

  • GOLD RUSH READY: Be prepared with the right tools when you’re in the field gold mining or gold prospecting with the handy ASR Outdoor 4-Piece Gold Panning Accessory Tools Kit; featuring two plastic trowels or scoops, one ½ inch classifier screen and one glass vial, these accessories will help in your gold recovery and storage efforts
  • HEAVY DUTY PLASTIC TROWELS: The reinforced, heavy duty, single piece construction plastic gold panning sand scoop shovel is nonmetallic, rust-free and corrosion resistant, allowing you to use and reuse the gold mining tool for many gold panning seasons to come; the deep black and green colors allow for even the finest gold flakes to stand out from your mineral deposit
  • MULTIPURPOSE TROWEL SCOOP TOOLS: When you’re not using the ASR Outdoor trowels or scoops for gold panning or gold mining, you can utilize the scoop for gardening, as a pooper scooper, to scoop feed or seed, as a kid’s scoop at the beach and a wide variety of other tasks
  • GOLD MINING EQUIPMENT: All the equipment in this gold panning kit is made from high quality materials that will see you through many gold prospecting seasons to come and will stand up to lots of wear and tear
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Kit includes: two (2) green and black plastic trowels or scoops, one (1) ½ inch classifier screen and one (1) glass vial; Material: plastic sieve and trowels, glass vial; Dimensions: ; Weight: 1.45lbs

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 4PCGKITGRN
  • UPC: 810058482549
  • Color: Green
  • Size: 4pc

X2 PLASTIC TROWELS: The ASR Outdoor plastic gold panning trowels are made from reinforced, heavy-duty, single-piece construction plastic. The shovel is non-metallic, rust-free and corrosion-resistant, allowing you to use and reuse the gold recovery tool for many gold panning seasons to come! In addition to these trowels’ formidable construction, the shovels also boast a deep black and green color to help sort and spot and gold among other particles like sand, dirt and minerals. And, when you’re not using the gold panning trowel tool, the handheld shovel can be used in your backyard for gardening purposes, or as a pooper scooper tool to pick up after pets like cats or dogs in your garden.

X1 GREEN CLASSIFIER SCREEN: For any aspiring and dedicated prospectors, this is a must-have item for gold panning and mineral recovery. The classification screen will aid your efforts by sorting your raw materials based on size. This extra small ½ inch particle screen is made of tough, high-impact plastic and 0.1mm stainless steel wire.

X1 GLASS STORAGE VIALS: Never lose your small valuable items again with the Gold Rush 2 Dram Glass Vial. This durable glass vial will ensure that your craft supplies, gems and other tiny valuables are safe and contained; the glass vials feature a water-tight screw top cap, as well as a durable glass see-through body so you'll be able to identify items easily. Happy Prospecting! With the right gold panning accessories sand tools, we hope you’re able to increase your gold recovery efforts and strike it rich!
